name: eaemployeewithtestsprite
description: Employee Manager Application with Comprehensive Playwright E2E Tests

scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test --config=playwright.config.js && npm run test:report
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test --grep="@smoke" && npm run test:report
scripts.test:critical: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test --grep="@critical" && npm run test:report
scripts.test:auth: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test tests/e2e/auth.spec.js && npm run test:report
scripts.test:employees: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test tests/e2e/employees.spec.js && npm run test:report
scripts.test:ui: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test tests/e2e/ui-ux.spec.js && npm run test:report
scripts.test:validation: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test tests/e2e/form-validation.spec.js && npm run test:report
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test tests/e2e/integration.spec.js && npm run test:report
scripts.test:headed: npm run test:cleanup && playwright test --headed && npm run test:report
scripts.setup: npm run test:install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install

author: QA Automation Team
